title: Booking a Hotel Room

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Hello, do you have a vacant room?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: أَهْلًا وَسَهْلًا! نَعَمْ، لَدَيْنَا غُرَفٌ مُتَاحَةٌ. مَا نَوْعُ الْغُرْفَةِ الَّتِي تُرِيدُهَا؟
lines.bs: Dobrodošli! Da, imamo slobodnih soba. Kakvu sobu želite?
lines.en: Welcome! Yes, we have rooms available. What type of room do you want?

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I would like a single room, please.

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Very well. How many nights do you plan to stay?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: أُرِيدُ الْإِقَامَةَ ثَلَاثَ لَيَالٍ، مِنَ الْيَوْمِ حَتَّى الْجُمُعَةِ.
lines.bs: Želim ostati tri noći, od danas do petka.
lines.en: I want to stay three nights, from today until Friday.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: مُمْتَازٌ. سِعْرُ الْغُرْفَةِ الْمُفْرَدَةِ مِئَةُ دُولَارٍ فِي اللَّيْلَةِ، وَيَشْمَلُ الْإِفْطَارَ.
lines.bs: Odlično. Cijena jednokrevetne sobe je sto dolara po noći, uključujući doručak.
lines.en: Excellent. The price of a single room is one hundred dollars per night, including breakfast.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: هَلْ يُمْكِنُ أَنْ تَكُونَ الْغُرْفَةُ بِإِطْلَالَةٍ عَلَى الْحَدِيقَةِ؟
lines.bs: Da li može soba s pogledom na vrt?
lines.en: Can the room have a view of the garden?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: بِالتَّأْكِيدِ، لَدَيْنَا غُرْفَةٌ فِي الطَّابِقِ الثَّالِثِ بِإِطْلَالَةٍ جَمِيلَةٍ عَلَى الْحَدِيقَةِ.
lines.bs: Naravno, imamo sobu na trećem spratu s lijepim pogledom na vrt.
lines.en: Of course, we have a room on the third floor with a beautiful view of the garden.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: رَائِعٌ! كَيْفَ يُمْكِنُنِي أَنْ أَدْفَعَ؟ هَلْ تَقْبَلُونَ بِطَاقَةَ الاِئْتِمَانِ؟
lines.bs: Odlično! Kako mogu platiti? Primate li kreditne kartice?
lines.en: Wonderful! How can I pay? Do you accept credit cards?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: نَعَمْ، نَقْبَلُ بَطَاقَاتِ الاِئْتِمَانِ وَالدَّفْعَ النَّقْدِيَّ أَيْضًا.
lines.bs: Da, primamo kreditne kartice i gotovinu.
lines.en: Yes, we accept credit cards and cash payment as well.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: سَأَدْفَعُ بِبَطَاقَةِ الاِئْتِمَانِ. هَلْ يُمْكِنُنِي الاِطِّلَاعُ عَلَى الْغُرْفَةِ أَوَّلًا؟
lines.bs: Platit ću kreditnom karticom. Mogu li prvo pogledati sobu?
lines.en: I will pay by credit card. Can I see the room first?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: بِكُلِّ سُرُورٍ. تَفَضَّلْ مَعِي، سَأُرِيكَ الْغُرْفَةَ الآنَ.
lines.bs: S velikim zadovoljstvom. Izvolite sa mnom, pokazat ću vam sobu sada.
lines.en: With great pleasure. Please come with me, I will show you the room now.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: شُكْرًا جَزِيلًا. الْغُرْفَةُ جَمِيلَةٌ جِدًّا، سَآخُذُهَا.
lines.bs: Hvala lijepa. Soba je vrlo lijepa, uzet ću je.
lines.en: Thank you very much. The room is very beautiful, I will take it.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: عَظِيمٌ! هَلْ يُمْكِنُكَ تَعْبِئَةُ نَمُوذَجِ التَّسْجِيلِ وَإِعْطَائِي جَوَازَ سَفَرِكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ؟
lines.bs: Odlično! Možete li ispuniti obrazac za prijavu i dati mi vaš pasoš, molim?
lines.en: Great! Could you fill in the registration form and give me your passport, please?

grammarFocus: questions with هَلْ and noun phrases with indefinite nouns
